0.text: Appearances suggestive of secretions in the bronchial structures in both lower lobes

1.text: Bronchiectasis in both lungs, especially in the lower lobes and central parts

2.text: Consolidation in the posterior part of the lower lobes of both lungs

3.text: Tree-in-bud appearances, more prominent in the lower lobes and posterior part of both lungs

4.text: Nodular consolidation in a small area in the anterior segment of the upper lobe of the right lung
